name: Siege in Progress
description:
Siege in Progress

You are apart of a noble family during a civil war in the 1300s. Unfortunately, you've ended up on the wrong side and your castle is under siege. They've already reached your outer baileys but your defenses have been keeping them from getting past the moat, but it's only the first week of the siege, how much longer will you really be able to last?
creator: canoex
